heroText: Connect with 50+ companies and discover opportunities that match your skills, passion, and career aspirations.
featuresText: Our platform combines cutting-edge technology with human expertise to deliver exceptional results
jobsText: Discover your next career move with our curated selection of featured jobs
ctaText: Join millions of professionals who have found their dream jobs through wijha. Your next opportunity is just a click away.
employersSubtitle: Join professionals working at leading Algerian companies
feature1Desc: Create a profile that showcases your skills and experiences in an organized manner, helping employers quickly assess your suitability.
feature2Desc: One-click apply feature lets you submit applications instantly with your saved profile and resume.
feature3Desc: Access free courses, certifications, and resources to enhance your skills and stand out to employers.
feature4Desc: Your data is encrypted and secure. Control who sees your profile and applications with privacy settings.
jobsError: Failed to load jobs. Please try again later.
jobsEmpty: No jobs available right now. Check back soon!
footerTagline: Empowering careers and connecting talent with opportunity. Join the future of job searching.
aboutHeroSubtitle: In a world full of choices and challenges, many young people find themselves in a state of hesitation and professional confusion — between great ambitions and an unclear reality. That's where Wijha came to be more than just a platform… a true launchpad toward the future.
aboutWhatDesc: Wijha is a digital platform that aims to connect ambitious youth with the right opportunities, by combining employment, career guidance, and building an effective professional community. We believe every person holds great potential — they just need the right direction.
aboutVisionDesc: To be the leading Arabic platform in guiding youth toward their professional paths with awareness and effectiveness, accompanying them on their journey from learning to work.
aboutMission1: Discover their capabilities and define their goals
aboutMission2: Access real job and training opportunities
aboutMission4: Make informed decisions for their future
aboutOffer1: Job and training opportunities from trusted companies
aboutOffer2: Guidance content to help you understand the job market
aboutOffer3: A professional community for sharing experiences and opportunities
aboutOffer4: Tools to help you develop your skills and career path
aboutWhyDesc: Because we don't just help you find a job… we help you choose the right path.
aboutPhilosophyDesc: Success is not in arriving quickly… but in arriving at the right destination.
contactHeroSubtitle: Have a question or want to get in touch? We'd love to hear from you.
contactFormSubtitle: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contactSuccessText: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you shortly.
contactErrorText: Something went wrong. Please try again.
contactEmailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
